name: @cred-ninja/sdk
description: OAuth2 credential delegation for AI agents

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/oauth && npm run build --workspace=packages/tofu && npm run build --workspace=packages/vault && npm run build --workspace=packages/guard && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/integrations/vercel-ai && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp && npm run build --workspace=packages/server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/oauth && npm run test --workspace=packages/tofu && npm run test --workspace=packages/vault && npm run test --workspace=packages/guard && npm run test --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run test --workspace=packages/server && npm run test --workspace=packages/integrations/vercel-ai
